name: powerbi-mcp-claude
description: Claude Desktop extension for Power BI workspaces, semantic models, and Microsoft device-code sign-in.
long_description: Provides Claude Desktop access to Power BI through stable local wrapper tools and Microsoft's remote Fabric Power BI MCP endpoint. When sign-in is needed, the server returns the Microsoft URL and device code in chat instead of requiring users to inspect terminal logs.

tenant_id.title: Microsoft tenant
tenant_id.description: Tenant ID, tenant domain, or organizations.

client_id.title: Microsoft public client ID
client_id.description: Use the default Power BI public client, or provide your own public-client app registration.

default_workspace_id.title: Default Power BI workspace ID
default_workspace_id.description: Optional workspace ID to use when Fabric MCP tools require a workspace ID and cannot list workspaces.

default_workspace_name.title: Default Power BI workspace name
default_workspace_name.description: Optional display name for the configured default workspace.

default_semantic_model_id.title: Default Power BI semantic model ID
default_semantic_model_id.description: Optional semantic model, dataset, or artifact ID to use when Fabric MCP tools require a semantic model ID.

default_semantic_model_name.title: Default Power BI semantic model name
default_semantic_model_name.description: Optional display name for the configured default semantic model.
